inputs.label: Number of Guests
inputs.businessContext: Total number of people attending the BBQ

inputs.label: Meat per Person
inputs.businessContext: Average cooked meat consumption per person in grams

inputs.label: Sides per Person
inputs.businessContext: Average side dish (salads, bread) consumption per person in grams

inputs.label: Cooking Loss Factor
inputs.businessContext: Percentage of weight lost during cooking due to moisture and fat rendering

inputs.label: Butcher Yield
inputs.businessContext: Edible meat yield from raw purchase weight after trimming bone and skin
